views.view_definition:
SELECT r.id,
    r.ip_type,
    r.origin,
    r.status,
    r.portfolio_status,
    r.record_owner_type,
    r.application_number,
    r.application_date,
    r.registration_number,
    r.registration_date,
    r.renewal_date,
    r.country_code,
    r.wipo_ir,
    r.aripo_ir,
    r.transaction_hierarchy,
    r.parent_id,
    r.created_at,
    r.updated_at,
    td.brand_name,
    td.brand_image_url,
    COALESCE(( SELECT string_agg(p.name, ', '::text ORDER BY a.order_index) AS string_agg
           FROM (ip_record_applicants a
             JOIN persons p ON ((p.id = a.person_id)))
          WHERE (a.ip_record_id = r.id)), ''::text) AS applicant_names,
    COALESCE(( SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('id', p.id, 'name', p.name, 'personType', p.type) ORDER BY a.order_index) AS jsonb_agg
           FROM (ip_record_applicants a
             JOIN persons p ON ((p.id = a.person_id)))
          WHERE (a.ip_record_id = r.id)), '[]'::jsonb) AS applicants_json,
    COALESCE(( SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT c.class_no ORDER BY c.class_no) AS array_agg
           FROM ip_record_classes c
          WHERE (c.ip_record_id = r.id)), '{}'::integer[]) AS nice_classes
   FROM (ip_records r
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_trademark_details td ON ((td.ip_record_id = r.id)));

SELECT t.id,
    t.title,
    t.description,
    t.task_type_id,
    t.status,
    t.priority,
    t.ip_record_id,
    t.transaction_id,
    t.task_owner_id,
    t.created_by,
    t.assigned_to,
    t.delivery_date,
    t.official_due_date,
    t.operational_due_date,
    t.details,
    t.created_at,
    t.updated_at,
    COALESCE(ip.application_number, s.file_no, (t.details ->> 'application_number'::text)) AS "iprecordApplicationNo",
    COALESCE(tmd.brand_name, s.title, s.court_name, (t.details ->> 'brand_name'::text), t.title) AS "iprecordTitle",
    COALESCE(p_owner.name, p_suit_client.name, p_task_owner.name, (t.details ->> 'applicant_name'::text)) AS "iprecordApplicantName",
    COALESCE(bull.bulletin_no, (t.details ->> 'bulletin_no'::text)) AS "bulletinNo",
    COALESCE((bull.bulletin_date)::text, (t.details ->> 'bulletin_date'::text)) AS "bulletinDate"
   FROM ((((((((tasks t
     LEFT JOIN ip_records ip ON ((t.ip_record_id = ip.id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_trademark_details tmd ON ((ip.id = tmd.ip_record_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_bulletins bull ON ((ip.id = bull.ip_record_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_applicants ipa ON (((ip.id = ipa.ip_record_id) AND (ipa.order_index = 0))))
     LEFT JOIN persons p_owner ON ((ipa.person_id = p_owner.id)))
     LEFT JOIN suits s ON ((t.ip_record_id = s.id)))
     LEFT JOIN persons p_suit_client ON ((s.client_id = p_suit_client.id)))
     LEFT JOIN persons p_task_owner ON ((t.task_owner_id = p_task_owner.id)));

SELECT t.id,
    t.title,
    t.description,
    t.task_type_id,
    t.status,
    t.priority,
    t.ip_record_id,
    t.transaction_id,
    t.task_owner_id,
    t.created_by,
    t.assigned_to,
    t.delivery_date,
    t.official_due_date,
    t.operational_due_date,
    t.details,
    t.created_at,
    t.updated_at,
    COALESCE(ip.application_number, s.file_no, (t.details ->> 'application_number'::text)) AS "iprecordApplicationNo",
    COALESCE(tm.brand_name, s.title, t.title, (t.details ->> 'brand_name'::text)) AS "iprecordTitle",
    COALESCE(p.name, plv.applicant_names, (t.details ->> 'applicant_name'::text)) AS "iprecordApplicantName",
    b.bulletin_no AS "bulletinNo",
    b.bulletin_date AS "bulletinDate"
   FROM ((((((tasks t
     LEFT JOIN ip_records ip ON ((t.ip_record_id = ip.id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_trademark_details tm ON ((ip.id = tm.ip_record_id)))
     LEFT JOIN suits s ON ((t.ip_record_id = s.id)))
     LEFT JOIN persons p ON ((t.task_owner_id = p.id)))
     LEFT JOIN portfolio_list_view plv ON ((t.ip_record_id = plv.id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_bulletins b ON ((t.ip_record_id = b.ip_record_id)));

SELECT mn.id,
    mn.subject,
    mn.status,
    mn.created_at,
    mn.is_held,
    mn.to_list,
    mn.cc_list,
    mn.objection_deadline,
    mn.associated_transaction_id,
    mn.source_document_id,
    mn.related_ip_record_id,
    ir.application_number AS app_no,
    tt.alias AS type_text,
    COALESCE(( SELECT p.name
           FROM (tasks t
             JOIN persons p ON ((p.id = t.task_owner_id)))
          WHERE (t.id = tx.task_id)
         LIMIT 1), ( SELECT p.name
           FROM (ip_record_applicants ira
             JOIN persons p ON ((p.id = ira.person_id)))
          WHERE (ira.ip_record_id = ir.id)
         LIMIT 1), '-'::text) AS client_name,
    mn.associated_task_id,
    mn.triggered_by_user_id,
    mn.sent_by,
    ( SELECT u.display_name
           FROM users u
          WHERE (u.id = mn.triggered_by_user_id)
         LIMIT 1) AS triggered_by_name,
    ( SELECT u.display_name
           FROM users u
          WHERE (u.id = mn.sent_by)
         LIMIT 1) AS sent_by_name,
    tsk.status AS task_status,
    td.brand_name
   FROM (((((mail_notifications mn
     LEFT JOIN ip_records ir ON ((ir.id = mn.related_ip_record_id)))
     LEFT JOIN transactions tx ON ((tx.id = mn.associated_transaction_id)))
     LEFT JOIN transaction_types tt ON ((tt.id = tx.transaction_type_id)))
     LEFT JOIN tasks tsk ON ((tsk.id = mn.associated_task_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ip_record_trademark_details td ON ((td.ip_record_id = ir.id)));

triggers.definition: CREATE TRIGGER incoming_document_indexed AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.incoming_documents FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION supabase_functions.http_request('https://kadxvkejzctwymzeyrrl.supabase.co/functions/v1/handle-indexed-document', 'POST', '{"Content-type":"application/json"}', '{}', '5000')
CREATE TRIGGER trigger_task_delete_cleanup AFTER DELETE ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_on_task_delete_cleanup()
CREATE TRIGGER trigger_handle_accrual_task_status AFTER UPDATE OF status ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((old.status IS DISTINCT FROM new.status)) EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_handle_accrual_task_status()

CREATE TRIGGER trigger_cleanup_transaction_on_rejection AFTER UPDATE OF status ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((old.status IS DISTINCT FROM new.status)) EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_cleanup_transaction_on_rejection()

CREATE TRIGGER task_mail_triggers AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION supabase_functions.http_request('https://kadxvkejzctwymzeyrrl.supabase.co/functions/v1/handle-task-mails', 'POST', '{"Content-type":"application/json","Authorization":"Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImthZHh2a2VqemN0d3ltemV5cnJsIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjE3ODQ0OCwiZXhwIjoyMDg3NzU0NDQ4fQ.WUKhJrBnWNABIZnUj9EF2zKyIsan7M3DCm7Nwu1NeGQ"}', '{}', '5000')
CREATE TRIGGER unlock_evaluation_mail_trigger AFTER UPDATE ON public.tasks FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trg_unlock_evaluation_mail()

functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
insert into public.users (id, email, display_name, role)
values (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    -- Kayıtta isim verilmişse onu al, yoksa e-postanın '@' öncesini isim yap
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'display_name', split_part(new.email, '@', 1)), 
    'belirsiz' -- Varsayılan rol
);
return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_all_tables()
 RETURNS TABLE(table_name text)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
SELECT table_name::text
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE';
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.trg_handle_accrual_task_status()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
-- DURUM A: Görev yeni tamamlandıysa (completed)
IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND OLD.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'completed' THEN
    
    UPDATE tasks
    SET 
    status = 'open',
    updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE details->>'parent_task_id' = NEW.id
    AND task_type_id = '53'
    AND status = 'pending';

-- DURUM B: Görev "tamamlandı" statüsünden geri alındıysa (re-open)
ELSIF OLD.status = 'completed' AND NEW.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'completed' THEN
    
    UPDATE tasks
    SET 
    status = 'pending',
    updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE details->>'parent_task_id' = NEW.id
    AND task_type_id = '53'
    AND status = 'open';
    
END IF;

RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.trg_unlock_evaluation_mail()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  -- Eğer güncellenen görev 66 (Değerlendirme) tipindeyse VE statüsü yeni 'completed' olmuşsa
  IF NEW.task_type_id = '66' AND NEW.status = 'completed' AND OLD.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'completed' THEN
    
    -- Bu görevin bağlı olduğu PDF işlemine ait 'evaluation_pending' durumundaki maili serbest bırak
    UPDATE public.mail_notifications
    SET 
        status = 'awaiting_client_approval'
        -- Hata veren updated_at = NOW() satırını buradan kaldırdık!
    WHERE associated_transaction_id = NEW.transaction_id
      AND status = 'evaluation_pending';
      
  END IF;

  RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$
